untranslatable_reason: The signal references a 'Divergence Index (DI)' indicator with upper/lower bands that is not in the allowed indicator list. The source text is incomplete and does not provide specific band values or trend definitions (all marked AUTHOR_SILENT). DI is a proprietary/custom indicator not available in standard backtesting libraries. A reasonable proxy approximation using Bollinger Bands and trend-following MA has been provided, but this is NOT the original signal.
translation_notes: Original signal requires 'Divergence Index' which is not available. Approximation uses: (1) Bollinger Bands as proxy for band crossovers, (2) SMA_20 as trend definition, (3) SMA_50 crossover as zero-line equivalent exit. This is a best-effort translation only and may not replicate the original strategy behavior.
